caption: The video features a man with a distinctive hairstyle, wearing headphones and a white shirt with gold suspenders and a red bow tie, sitting in front of a microphone. He appears to be engaged in a podcast or radio show, as indicated by the "Boss Talk 101" logo visible on the screen. The setting is a studio with various decorations and posters on the walls, including one that reads "Inque Fashion." In the background, a woman with pink hair, dressed in a green outfit, is seen holding a phone, possibly monitoring or assisting with the recording. The man seems focused and is likely speaking into the microphone, contributing to the ongoing discussion or interview.
